improvements.change: Require explicit deployment ordering for Key Vault references: create identity, assign Key Vault Secrets User RBAC, then apply app settings with @Microsoft.KeyVault references.
improvements.rationale: Prevents first-run resolution failures caused by RBAC timing.

improvements.change: Instruct the implementor to avoid split ownership of the same app settings across modules/resources unless deliberately staged.
improvements.rationale: Reduces configuration drift and maintenance overhead.

improvements.change: Add a guardrail to avoid generated Bicep build artifacts (e.g., infra/main.json) being committed.
improvements.rationale: Keeps IaC PRs source-focused and avoids generated-file drift.

improvements.change: Clarify when non-credential configuration values should be treated as secrets and marked @secure.
improvements.rationale: Aligns implementation with team security policy while avoiding unnecessary secure-parameter friction.
